info.description: Chronological microblogging platform — pre-2022 Twitter clone.
info.title: Soapbox API

post.description: Authenticate with email and password. Returns an access token and sets a refresh token cookie.
Invalidate all sessions for the authenticated user and clear the refresh token cookie.
Exchange a valid refresh token (from cookie) for a new access token and rotated refresh token cookie.
Create an account with email, password, and username. Returns an access token and sets a refresh token cookie.
Returns a presigned S3 URL for direct file upload. The client uploads the file directly to S3 using this URL, then confirms the upload.
Marks a pending upload as ready. Call this after successfully uploading the file to the presigned URL.
Create a new post with text and optional image attachments. Supports replies (parent_id) and reposts (repost_of_id). Automatically extracts hashtags and fetches link previews.

get.description: Full-text search over post body content, cursor-paginated.
Retrieve a post by ID. If authenticated, includes whether the viewer has liked or reposted this post.

delete.description: Delete a post. Only the post author can delete their own post.

post.description: Add a like to a post. Returns the updated like count.

delete.description: Remove a like from a post. Returns the updated like count.

get.description: Retrieve replies to a post, cursor-paginated in chronological order.

post.description: Repost an existing post. Returns the updated repost count.

delete.description: Remove a repost of a post. Returns the updated repost count.

put.description: Update display name, bio, or avatar URL for the authenticated user.

get.description: Full-text search over usernames and display names, cursor-paginated.
Retrieve a user's profile by username. If authenticated, includes whether the viewer follows this user.

post.description: Follow the user identified by username. Requires authentication.

delete.description: Remove a follow relationship with the user identified by username. Requires authentication.

get.description: Retrieve a cursor-paginated list of users who follow the given username.
Retrieve a cursor-paginated list of users that the given username follows.
Retrieve root posts by a user, cursor-paginated in reverse chronological order. If authenticated, includes liked/reposted status.
